positive: A whimsical illustration of three anthropomorphic woodland animals (a badger, a fox, and a bunny) having a picnic in a magical forest clearing. The style is highly detailed storybook illustration, soft pastel colors, storybook art, whimsical, Studio Ghibli inspired.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
